## Bug Description

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Artifact Input

- **Domain:** (e.g., automotive ISO 26262, aerospace DO-178C, medical IEC 62304)
- **Format:** (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML)

## Expected Behavior

What AVERA should have produced.

## Actual Behavior

What AVERA actually produced. Include the full output or relevant section.
